DEFINITION_DETAIL: Oracle AI agent for detecting shipment anomalies using ML models. Analyzes historical patterns, weather data, and carrier performance to flag at-risk shipments before they fail.
Limited visibility: trigger context only. Full ML model logic not exposed by OTM 26B. Uses external traffic and weather APIs for prediction.
Collides with AUTO_TENDER_CARRIER on same event — THE DELIBERATE CONFLICT. Uses reinforcement learning to optimize carrier selection and rate negotiation in real-time.
